do_if.value: global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and $target.defaultorder? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: $target.commander? and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_if.value: $target.allsubordinates? and @$target.allsubordinates.count gt 0 and $target.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

$target.defaultorder? and @$target.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_elseif.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$target}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$target.commander}? and $target.commander.defaultorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs? and (global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.id} or (@$target.commander.defaultorder.id == 'Assist' and $target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder? and global.$GT_ProtectedOrderIDs.indexof.{@$target.commander.defaultorder.$baseorder.id}))

do_if.value: not $commander? or not $commander.exists or not $commander.allsubordinates? or @$commander.allsubordinates.count lt 1

show_notification.text: '[GT] Redistribute Pilots unavailable: no eligible subordinates found.'

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] Requested for commander ' + $commander.idcode + ' with ' + @$commander.allsubordinates.count + ' subordinates'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is in a blacklisted or dangerous sector and is actively trying to leave. No trades will be searched until the ship reaches a safe sector.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship trade destination was threatened or blacklisted. Ship is searching for an alternative route or cancelling the current trade.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has cargo from a previous session or order. It must sell all existing cargo before it can search for new buy trades. The ship is looking for the best buyer for its current cargo.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is damaged and heading to a shipyard or equipment dock for repairs. Trading is paused until repairs are complete.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is actively running the GalaxyTrader order. It is either searching for trades, executing a trade (buying/selling), or waiting for a work unit from the scheduler.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is currently executing a trade order (buying or selling at a station). This is a sub-order created by GalaxyTrader.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Galaxy Miner is executing a sell leg (' + $activeOrderId + ') with cargo on board — docking or trading at the buyer station.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is executing a non-GT order (' + $activeOrderId + '). This order may have been queued externally or by another mod.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is resupplying (ammunition, deployables, etc.) at a station. Trading resumes after resupply is complete.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship has an active repair order. It is heading to or being repaired at a shipyard/equipment dock.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is docked at a station or waiting. This may indicate it is waiting for docking clearance or between trade cycles.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is flying to a destination zone. It may be heading to a buy or sell station.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc
set_value.exact: 'Ship is executing a non-GT order (' + $activeOrderId + '). This order may have been queued externally or by another mod.'

set_value.name: $activityDesc

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP Runtime Note', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'NPC suppliers still compete on score. MinPlayerMoney purchase gate skipped for player-supplier pairs (internal economy). Vanilla buy leg may still move credits at execution.']

set_value.name: $diagMk4HomeSector

do_if.value: not $ignoreBuildStorage and not $diagMk4AllowResources and not $diagMk4AllowIntermediates and not $diagMk4AllowTradewares

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Supplier Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'player=' + (if $diagMk4AllowPlayerSuppliers then 'on' else 'off') + ', faction=' + (if $diagMk4AllowAiSuppliers then 'on' else 'off')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Ware Categories', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'res/int/tw=' + (if $diagMk4AllowResources then 'on' else 'off') + '/' + (if $diagMk4AllowIntermediates then 'on' else 'off') + '/' + (if $diagMk4AllowTradewares then 'on' else 'off')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Build Storage Only Mode', $Status = if $diagMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode then ('active (BS on, all ware categories off; home=' + (if $diagMk4HomeAnchor? and $diagMk4HomeAnchor.exists then @$diagMk4HomeAnchor.knownname else 'unknown') + ')') else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Serve Home Only', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMk4DedicatedServe then ('true (home=' + (if $diagMk4HomeAnchor? and $diagMk4HomeAnchor.exists then @$diagMk4HomeAnchor.knownname else 'unknown') + ')') else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Execution Policy Snapshot', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'pairView=all (PASS+FAIL with reason), priceCap=source<=customer, demandGate=vanillaRes+gtInFlight(global), ignoreTradeRules=faction-access-only' + (if $diagMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode then ', buildStorageOnly=delivery to player BS within jumpDistanceCoverage' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Class Priorities', $Status = if $diagMk42NoDeliveryTargets then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = 'BS=' + $diagMk42PrioBs + ' ST=' + $diagMk42PrioSt + ' AX=' + $diagMk42PrioAx + ' CR=' + $diagMk42PrioCr + ' (0=off, 1-10=score multiplier only)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Priority Ware Bonus', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'multiplier=' + $diagMk42PrioWareMult + ' (1=no bonus, 2-10=additive on base score)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Supplier Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'player=' + (if $diagMk42AllowPlayerSuppliers then 'on' else 'off') + ', faction=' + (if $diagMk42AllowAiSuppliers then 'on' else 'off') + ' (score bias only; both sources stay in pool when on)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Dual-Axis Buckets', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'tradematch: delivery class (BS/ST/AX/CR) x supplier source (Player/Npc), top-K merge before score.trades']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Build-Storage-Only Mode', $Status = if $diagMk42BuildStorageOnlyMode then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMk42BuildStorageOnlyMode then ('derived from sliders (home=' + (if $diagMk42HomeAnchor? and $diagMk42HomeAnchor.exists then @$diagMk42HomeAnchor.knownname else 'unknown') + ')') else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Serve Home Only', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMk42DedicatedServe then ('true (home=' + (if $diagMk42HomeAnchor? and $diagMk42HomeAnchor.exists then @$diagMk42HomeAnchor.knownname else 'unknown') + ')') else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 No Delivery Targets', $Status = if $diagMk42NoDeliveryTargets then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = if $diagMk42NoDeliveryTargets then 'All class sliders are 0 — ship idles (no search)' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Execution Policy Snapshot', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'dual-axis buckets, score.trades normBase x slider, validation order=finalScore (no class-first reorder), mk4_supply_v2 pool, cache=GT_TradeCacheMK42']

set_value.name: $diagMk4HomeSector

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows

do_if.value: $autoWares and ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and $wareBasket.count gt 0

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Manual Basket Active', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No (Auto Wares is ON; manual basket is ignored at runtime)']

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and (not $autoWares) and $wareBasket.count gt 0

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Priority Wares', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $priorityWaresDetail]

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Faction Priority', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $factionPriorityDetail]

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ship Proximity Weight', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $shipProxDetail]

append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sector Whitelist', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $sectorWhitelistDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Buyer Price Range', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'slider ' + $mk1DiagPriceOffset + '/200 (100=neutral, norm ' + $mk1DiagPriceNorm + ') -> buy min ' + $mk1DiagPriceNorm + ', supply sell max ' + (0 - $mk1DiagPriceNorm)]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'WARE_SNAPSHOT*', $Status = if $mk1WareSnapshotSig == 'pending (no MK1 cycle snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1WareSnapshotSig]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'SELL_STORAGE_GATE', $Status = if $mk1SellStorageGateSig == 'pending (no MK1 export gate snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1SellStorageGateSig]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'SELL_OFFER_SNAPSHOT', $Status = if $mk1SellOfferSnapshotSig == 'pending (no MK1 cycle snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1SellOfferSnapshotSig]

set_value.name: $mk1rtDestName
set_value.exact: if $mk1rt? and $mk1rt.buyer? and $mk1rt.buyer.exists and $mk1rt.buyer.knownname? then @$mk1rt.buyer.knownname else '?'

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'ROUTE_PLAN', $Status = if $mk1RoutePlanSnapshotSig == 'pending (no MK1 route plan snapshot yet)' then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = $mk1RoutePlanSnapshotSig]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- MK2 Specific ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Stations', $Status = if $mk2SourceCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $mk2SourceCount + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Destination Stations', $Status = if $mk2DestCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $mk2DestCount + ' stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Direction', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'BIDIRECTIONAL - every station can supply or receive (' + $mk2Union.count + ' participating stations, both directions evaluated)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ware Exchange', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'ON (ignoreoffersettings) - player-owned stations trade via storage discovery; a formal sell/buy offer is NOT required']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Storage Thresholds (min/static/max)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $mk2MinStorage + '% / ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '% / ' + $mk2MaxStorage + '% (source must be ABOVE static; dest must be AT OR BELOW min' + (if $mk2OrderBidirectional then '; bidirectional ladder enforced' else '; independent thresholds') + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Reserve: ' + @$mk2SrcStation.knownname + ' / ' + $mk2sw, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'cargo target = 0 (station has no allocated storage for this ware - runtime skips silently)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Reserve: ' + @$mk2SrcStation.knownname + ' / ' + $mk2sw, $Status = if $mk2swPasses then 'PASS' else 'BLOCK', $Detail = '' + $mk2swCount + ' / ' + $mk2swTarget + ' = ' + $mk2swRatio + '% ' + (if $mk2swPasses then '> ' else '<= ') + $mk2StaticStorage + '% staticStorage' + (if $mk2swPasses then ' (eligible to ship)' else ' (BELOW reserve - runtime refuses to drain)')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Source Reserve Summary', $Status = if $mk2SourceWaresEvaluated == 0 then 'WARN' else (if $mk2SourceWaresBelowStatic == $mk2SourceWaresEvaluated then 'BLOCK' else (if $mk2SourceWaresBelowStatic gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS')), $Detail = '' + ($mk2SourceWaresEvaluated - $mk2SourceWaresBelowStatic) + ' / ' + $mk2SourceWaresEvaluated + ' source-ware combinations are above the static reserve' + (if $mk2SourceWaresMissingTarget gt 0 then ' (' + $mk2SourceWaresMissingTarget + ' have no storage allocated)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Miner Specific ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Anchor', $Status = if $minerHome == 'Not set' then 'FAIL' else 'PASS', $Detail = $minerHome]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Configured Target Stations', $Status = if $diagMinerConfiguredTargetCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $diagMinerConfiguredTargetCount + ' in stationList (empty = miner auto-discovers demand stations at runtime)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Overflow Sell', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $minerOverflow then 'Enabled' else 'Disabled']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Player Stations Only', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $minerPlayerOnly then 'true' else 'false']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Check Demand First', $Status = if $diagMinerCheckDemandFirst then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = if $diagMinerCheckDemandFirst then 'true (demand-first) - checks station demand before starting to mine' else 'false (demand-off / stockpile) - mines proactively; selling still uses primary stations below overflow threshold or Overflow sell']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Demand-off Note', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Toggle OFF bypasses the mining demand gate only. Full bay with no willing buyer enters standby until capacity opens or overflow sell is enabled.']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Overflow Threshold', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $minerOverflowThreshold + '%']

set_value.name: $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail
set_value.exact: 'none (no mineable cargo and no active mining ware snapshot)'

do_if.value: $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homeStation? and $gtOrder.$homeStation.exists and $gtOrder.$homeStation.isoperational and ((not $diagMinerPlayerStationsOnly) or ($gtOrder.$homeStation.owner == $ship.owner)) and ((not $gtOrder.$homeSector?) or (not $gtOrder.$homeSector.exists) or ($gtOrder.$homeStation.sector == $gtOrder.$homeSector)) and not $diagMinerPrimaryStations.indexof.{$gtOrder.$homeStation}

$diagMinerSectorStation? and $diagMinerSectorStation.exists and $diagMinerSectorStation.isclass.station and $diagMinerSectorStation.isoperational and ((not $diagMinerPlayerStationsOnly) or ($diagMinerSectorStation.owner == $ship.owner)) and not $diagMinerPrimaryStations.indexof.{$diagMinerSectorStation}

$diagMinerSectorStation? and $diagMinerSectorStation.exists and $diagMinerSectorStation.isclass.station and $diagMinerSectorStation.isoperational and ((not $diagMinerPlayerStationsOnly) or ($diagMinerSectorStation.owner == $ship.owner)) and not $diagMinerPrimaryStations.indexof.{$diagMinerSectorStation}

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicySummary
set_value.exact: 'Per-ware: deliver to primary stations below ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% fill; wares at/above threshold use overflow sell rules when enabled'

do_elseif.value: $ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$Level?

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicySummary
set_value.exact: 'Overflow mode: fallback disabled, no additional sell targets allowed'

do_if.value: $mWare? and $mWare.hastag.minable and $ship.cargo.{$mWare}.count gt 0 and $ship.cargo.{$mWare}.max gt 0 and not $diagMinerOfferWares.indexof.{$mWare}

set_value.name: $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail
set_value.exact: 'auto-scope mode: all minable buyer offers (no selected/cargo ware available)'

do_if.value: not $diagMinerCargoHasWillingBuyer and $dcfwWare? and $dcfwWare.hastag.minable and $ship.cargo.{$dcfwWare}.count gt 0 and $ship.cargo.{$dcfwWare}.max gt 0
$cargoCap gt 0 and $cargoFree le 0 and not $diagMinerAllowOverflowSellToOthers and not $diagMinerCargoHasWillingBuyer and not $diagMinerCheckDemandFirst

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Sell Wares', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Miner Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $diagMinerPolicySummary]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Physical Storage Gate', $Status = if $diagMinerPhysicalGateActive then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $diagMinerPhysicalGateDetail]

set_value.name: $diagMinerRuntimeDemandDetail
set_value.exact: $diagMinerRuntimeDemandDetail + ' (' + $diagMinerRuntimeDemandAdded + ' auto-discovered within ' + $maxSell + ' sell jumps of home anchor - mirrors live miner)'

set_value.name: $diagMinerRuntimeDemandDetail
set_value.exact: '0 stations - no stationList, home station, or sell-range scan found any demand targets'

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Runtime Demand Stations', $Status = if $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerRuntimeDemandDetail]

set_value.name: $diagMinerCargoBuyerStatus
set_value.exact: if $diagMinerCargoHasWillingBuyer then 'PASS' else (if $cargoUsed gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO')

set_value.name: $diagMinerCargoBuyerDetail
set_value.exact: if $diagMinerCargoHasWillingBuyer then 'At least one carried minable ware has a primary station below the overflow threshold - miner should deliver' else (if $cargoUsed gt 0 then 'No primary station below overflow threshold for cargo on board - full bay cannot clear via primary delivery' else 'no cargo on board')

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo-first Willing Buyer', $Status = $diagMinerCargoBuyerStatus, $Detail = $diagMinerCargoBuyerDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Live Stall Reason (snapshot)', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerSnapshotStallReason]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Primary Stations', $Status = if $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $diagMinerPrimaryStations.count + ' stations used for policy/clearance scans']

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Primary Station Cargo', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Physical stock / storage target per ware (miner rejects primary delivery at or above ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% of target)']

do_if.value: $pssOffer? and $pssOffer.ware? and $pssOffer.ware.hastag.minable and $ship.cargo.{$pssOffer.ware}.max gt 0 and not $pssWares.indexof.{$pssOffer.ware}

set_value.name: $pssDetail
set_value.exact: $pssStationLabel + ' | ' + $pssWare.name + ': target=0 (station does not use this ware — miner will not deliver here)'

set_value.name: $pssDetail
set_value.exact: $pssStationLabel + ' | ' + $pssWare.name + ': ' + $pssPhysical + '/' + $pssTarget + ' (' + $pssFillPct + '% of target) — has capacity below ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% threshold'

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo', $Status = $pssStatus, $Detail = $pssDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec3.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $pssStationLabel + ' — no minable diagnose wares to evaluate (no cargo / no active ware snapshot / no buy offers on station)']

do_if.value: $ship.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$Level?
not $rscRefIsHome and $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homePosition? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.exists and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector
not $rscRefIsHome and $gtOrder? and $gtOrder.$homePosition? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.sector? and $gtOrder.$homePosition.{1}.sector.exists

not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.defaultorder? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.exists and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector

not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.defaultorder? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.sector? and $ship.defaultorder.$homePosition.{1}.sector.exists
not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.order? and $ship.order.$homePosition? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.exists and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.isclass.sector
not $rscRefIsHome and $ship.order? and $ship.order.$homePosition? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.sector? and $ship.order.$homePosition.{1}.sector.exists

$rscKeep and $ship.isplayerowned and $rscBlGroup? and $rscBlGroup != null and $ship.hasblacklist.{blacklisttype.sectoractivity}.{$rscBlGroup} and $rscSec.isblacklisted.{blacklisttype.sectoractivity}.{$rscBlGroup}.{$ship}
$rscW? and $rscW.hastag.minable and ($rscW.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSourceList
append_to_list.exact: 'ware basket'

do_if.value: $rscW2? and $rscW2.hastag.minable and ($rscW2.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW2.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW2}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW2}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSourceList
append_to_list.exact: 'current cargo'

do_if.value: $rscW3? and $rscW3.hastag.minable and ($rscW3.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW3.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW3}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW3}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSourceList
append_to_list.exact: 'primary station buy offers'

set_value.name: $rscWareSource
set_value.exact: if $rscWareSourceList.count == 0 then 'none' else if $rscWareSourceList.count == 1 then $rscWareSourceList.{1} else if $rscWareSourceList.count == 2 then $rscWareSourceList.{1} + ' + ' + $rscWareSourceList.{2} else $rscWareSourceList.{1} + ' + ' + $rscWareSourceList.{2} + ' + ' + $rscWareSourceList.{3}

set_value.name: $rscWareSource
set_value.exact: 'sector resources in range (no basket, cargo, or station buy-offer pool)'

do_if.value: $rscW4? and $rscW4.hastag.minable and ($rscW4.waretransport == waretransport.solid or $rscW4.waretransport == waretransport.liquid) and $ship.cargo.{$rscW4}.max gt 0 and not $rscCandWares.indexof.{$rscW4}

append_to_list.name: $rscWareSectorsList
append_to_list.exact: table[$Name = $rscSecName, $Yield = $rscSecYield]

append_to_list.name: $rscWareRows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $WareName = if $rscWare.name? then $rscWare.name else '?', $IsActive = $rscIsActive, $HasAsteroids = $rscHasAsteroids, $DiscState = $rscDiscState, $Mineable = $rscMineable, $BestYield = $rscBestYield, $SectorCount = $rscWareSectorCount, $BestSector = $rscBestSecName, $TopSectors = $rscTopSectorsText, $EngineKnowsSectorName = $rscEngineKnowsSectorName, $ProbeInEngineKnownSector = $rscProbeInEngineKnownSector ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Scan Context ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reference Sector', $Status = if $rscRefSector? and $rscRefSector.exists then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = $rscRefSectorName]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Gather Range', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rscEffectiveRange + ' jumps' + (if $rscStayAtHome then ' (Stay At Home enabled, mining limited to home sector)' else if $rscMaxGather lt $rscMaxGatherRaw then (' (your setting: ' + $rscMaxGatherRaw + ', limited by pilot skill to ' + $rscPilotCap + ')') else (if $rscMaxGatherRaw gt 0 then '' else ' (your setting: 0)'))]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sectors In Range', $Status = if $rscRawSectors.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $rscRawSectors.count + ' sectors reachable from the reference sector']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Safe Sectors', $Status = if $rscKeptSectors.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $rscKeptSectors.count + ' usable / ' + $rscDroppedCount + ' excluded (hostile, hazardous, contested, or on your sector blacklist)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sector Blacklist Group', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $rscBlGroup? and $rscBlGroup != null then '' + $rscBlGroup else 'None']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Safe Sector Names', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $rscKeptNamesText]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Yield Handling', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'sectorYield is informational only; sectors are not ignored just because yield reads 0']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Candidate Wares', $Status = if $rscCandWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $rscCandWares.count + ' minable wares (taken from: ' + $rscWareSource + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reachable Wares', $Status = if $rscHasAsteroidsCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $rscHasAsteroidsCount + ' of ' + $rscCandWares.count + ' wares have asteroids in a safe sector in range (resource exists in sector; yield may be 0)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Discovery Coverage', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'no asteroids in range to evaluate discovery for' ]

set_value.name: $rscDiscDetail
set_value.exact: '' + $rscMineableCount + ' of ' + $rscHasAsteroidsCount + ' reachable wares are confirmed discovered and ACTUALLY mineable for this player ship'

set_value.name: $rscDiscDetail
set_value.exact: $rscDiscDetail + '; ' + $rscUndiscoveredCount + ' undiscovered for player-ship routing (engine refuses to route to an asteroid until it is asteroid-level discovered; resource probes reveal YIELD only - see the per-ware Wares table for the exact remediation per ware)'

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Discovery Coverage', $Status = if $rscUndiscoveredCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = $rscDiscDetail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Wares (best yield first, top 12) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'No data', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No minable wares are available to this miner. Add a minable ware to the ship ware basket, give the ship a solid or liquid cargo bay, or assign a station that buys a minable ware (see Sell Wares above).']

set_value.name: $rscWNote
set_value.exact: if $rscOut.$Mineable then ('top: ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors) else (if $rscOut.$DiscState == 'undiscovered' then (if $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName? and $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName != '' then (if $rscOut.$ProbeInEngineKnownSector then ('engine knows the asteroid is in ' + $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName + ' and your resource probe IS already in that sector - the probe reveals YIELD only, vanilla mining still needs asteroid-level discovery for player ships; fly a ship close to the asteroid to scout it visually OR drop a satellite within line-of-sight (top: ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors + ')') else ('engine knows the asteroid is in ' + $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName + ' but no player resource probe is there - drop a probe in ' + $rscOut.$EngineKnowsSectorName + ', scout the sector with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot the asteroid visually (top: ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors + ')')) else ('asteroids exist in ' + $rscOut.$TopSectors + ' but the engine has not asteroid-discovered any - deploy a resource probe in one of these sectors, scout with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot it visually')) else 'no safe sector in range has this resource type')

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Status = $rscWStatus, $Check = $rscWLabel, $Detail = $rscWBest, $Col4 = $rscWReach, $Col5 = $rscWCount, $Col6 = $rscWNote ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '... (' + ($rscWareRows.count - $rscRenderCap) + ' more wares not shown)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Resource Probes (player faction, galaxy-wide) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'NPC ship', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'discovery is not gated for NPC ships - probe enumeration skipped']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Probes (galaxy-wide)', $Status = if $rscProbeTotal gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $rscProbeTotal + ' player-faction resource probe(s) found in the entire galaxy']

set_value.name: $rscProbeSecName
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeSec? and $rscProbeSec != null and $rscProbeSec.knownname? then @$rscProbeSec.knownname else 'unknown sector'

set_value.name: $rscProbeStatus
set_value.exact: if not $rscProbeObj.isoperational then 'WARN' else (if $rscProbeInKept then 'PASS' else 'WARN')

set_value.name: $rscProbeBucketNote
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeInKept then 'in this ship safe set' else (if $rscProbeInRaw then 'in range but FILTERED OUT of this ship safe set (hostile / hazard / contested / blacklist - useful to other fleet members only)' else 'OUT OF RANGE for this ship (>' + $rscEffectiveRange + ' gates from reference sector - useful to fleet members based closer)')

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Probe ' + $rscProbeIdc, $Status = $rscProbeStatus, $Detail = '[' + $rscProbeBucket + '] ' + $rscProbeSecName + ' (' + $rscProbeOpr + ') - ' + $rscProbeBucketNote ]

set_value.name: $rscProbeSY
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeSec? and $rscProbeSec != null and @$rscProbeSec.yieldrating.{$rscProbeWare} then @$rscProbeSec.yieldrating.{$rscProbeWare} else 0

set_value.name: $rscProbeWareStatus
set_value.exact: if $rscProbeRouteOK and $rscProbeInKept then 'PASS' else (if $rscProbeY gt 0 or $rscProbeSY gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO')

set_value.name: $rscProbeWareDetail
set_value.exact: 'probeYield=' + $rscProbeY + ', sectorYield=' + $rscProbeSY + ', routingDiscovered=' + (if $rscProbeRouteOK then ('yes -> ' + $rscProbeRouteSecName + ' (yield values are informational only)') else 'no (yield 0 is not a blocker by itself; engine found no discovered routable asteroid for this player ship)')

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = ' ' + $rscProbeWare.name, $Status = $rscProbeWareStatus, $Detail = $rscProbeWareDetail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Probe Buckets', $Status = if $rscProbeBucketKept gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = 'A-reachable for this ship: ' + $rscProbeBucketKept + ' | B-in-range-but-filtered: ' + $rscProbeBucketRaw + ' | C-out-of-range: ' + $rscProbeBucketOut ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Probe Diagnosis', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Other fleet members have probes deployed (B/C buckets) but NONE land in this ship safe-and-in-range set. This ship cannot benefit from those probes for ware selection. Either move this ship closer to a probe-covered sector, lift the safety filter that excluded the bucket-B sectors (raise gate distance / clear hostile-owner blacklist / accept hazardous regions), or have this ship deploy its own probe in a sector inside its safe set.' ]

append_to_list.name: $selWUndiscoveredAlts
append_to_list.exact: table[$Name = $selWWareName, $Urgency = $selWUrgency, $Sector = $selWRow.$BestSector, $EngineKnowsSector = $selWRow.$EngineKnowsSectorName, $ProbeInSector = $selWRow.$ProbeInEngineKnownSector]

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'no asteroid resource in any safe sector in range'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'undiscovered: asteroids exist in ' + $selWRow.$BestSector + ' but the player has not discovered them - deploy a resource probe in the sector, scout it with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot it visually'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'primary stations at ' + $selWStorageMax + '% ge ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold AND overflow sell to other stations is DISABLED - miner stuck waiting at galaxyminer.xml:1309'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'primary stations at ' + $selWStorageMax + '% ge ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold; overflow sell to other stations is enabled, so the miner will deliver to a non-primary buyer'

set_value.name: $selWBlockerDetail
set_value.exact: 'SELECTABLE - primary fill ' + $selWStorageMax + '% lt ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% threshold' + (if @$selWRow.$IsActive then ' (currently the active mining target)' else '')

append_to_list.name: $selWAllScored
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Name = $selWWareName, $Urgency = $selWUrgency, $Status = $selWBlockerStatus, $Detail = $selWBlockerDetail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Selectability (what the miner would pick now) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagMinerCheckDemandFirst then 'Demand-first mode: urgency scoring over primary stations' else 'Demand-off mode: fixed Resource Basket / slice-committed pick (urgency scoring skipped for mining gate)']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Would Select', $Status = 'PASS', $Detail = $selWBest + ' (urgency ' + $selWBestUrgency + ', primary fill ' + $selWBestStorageMax + '% lt ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% threshold)' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Would Select', $Status = if $selWStalled then 'FAIL' else 'WARN', $Detail = $selWStallCandidate + ' (urgency ' + $selWStallUrgency + ') - but primary fill ' + $selWStallStorageMax + '% is at or above the ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold' + (if $diagMinerAllowOverflowSellToOthers then '; overflow sell to other stations is enabled, so the miner can still deliver elsewhere' else '; overflow sell to other stations is DISABLED, so the miner is stuck waiting (see verdict)') ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Would Select', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'no mineable ware has any primary-station demand right now (no deficit at any primary station for any reachable+discovered ware)' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Demand Ranking (highest urgency first, with blocker reasons) ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = '#' + $selWri + ' ' + $selWRankRow.$Name, $Status = $selWRankRow.$Status, $Detail = 'urgency ' + $selWRankRow.$Urgency + ' - ' + $selWRankRow.$Detail ]

append_to_list.name: $sec3b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = '... (' + ($selWAllScored.count - $selWRankCap) + ' more wares with positive urgency not shown)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Profit Threshold ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Profit Threshold', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + ($finalProfitThreshold / 100) + ' Cr']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Min ROI', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $effectiveROI + '%']

append_to_list.name: $sec1.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Trade Gate', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Supply score + price profile (no ROI/profit floor)']

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Queue Status', $Status = $queueResult, $Detail = $queueDetail]

set_value.name: $procLockDetail
set_value.exact: 'Cache active: ' + $cacheActive + '/' + $cacheMax + ' | Live active: ' + $liveActive + '/' + $liveMax + ' | MK4 live active: ' + $mk4LiveActive + '/' + $mk4LiveMax + ' | MK4-2 live active: ' + $mk42LiveActive + '/' + $mk42LiveMax

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Scheduler Slots', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $procLockDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Sector Refresh Lock', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $refreshLockDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec6.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Live Search Cooldown', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $cooldownDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Exists', $Status = if $cacheExists then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = $diagCachePoolLabel + ' pool: ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries']

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'N/A (no cache max-distance metadata yet) - ship needs: ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'MK4-2 cache max distance metadata: ' + $cacheMaxDist + ' jumps; ship needs ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'MK4 cache max distance metadata: ' + $cacheMaxDist + ' jumps; ship needs ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

set_value.name: $cacheDistDetail
set_value.exact: 'MK3 cache max distance metadata: ' + $cacheMaxDist + ' jumps; ship needs ' + $maxDistance + ' jumps'

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Max Distance', $Status = $cacheDistResult, $Detail = $cacheDistDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Home Fleet Cargo Profile ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Cache-refresh live search uses fleet-min (same all ships); cache read uses per-ship cargotarget%; cache write is ship-agnostic']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK3 Cache Cohort', $Status = if $diagMk3Service then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = if $diagMk3Service then 'Ship is in MK3 cache-sharing cohort' else 'Ship is not in MK3 service (profile N/A)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'This Ship Required Vol', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'container=' + $diagShipReqContainer + ', solid=' + $diagShipReqSolid + ', liquid=' + $diagShipReqLiquid + ' (' + $diagFleetCargoPct + '% cargotarget)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'This Ship Free Cargo', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'container=' + $diagShipFreeContainer + ', solid=' + $diagShipFreeSolid + ', liquid=' + $diagShipFreeLiquid + ' (direct-live mintotalvolume max)']

set_value.name: $diagFleetProfileDetail
set_value.exact: 'No profile (cache-refresh live search falls back to totalvolume min=1 until next fleet rebuild)'

set_value.name: $diagFleetProfileDetail
set_value.exact: if $diagFleetShipCount gt 0 then ('Cohort at ' + $homeSectorName + ': ' + $diagFleetShipCount + ' MK3-service ships') else 'Empty cohort entry (fallback totalvolume min=1)'

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Profile Registry', $Status = $diagFleetProfileStatus, $Detail = $diagFleetProfileDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Profile Age', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $diagFleetProfileAge]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Fleet-Min Required Vol', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'container=' + $diagFleetMinContainer + ', solid=' + $diagFleetMinSolid + ', liquid=' + $diagFleetMinLiquid + ' (cache-refresh totalvolume min)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'This Ship Sets Fleet-Min', $Status = if $diagFleetLimitBuckets != '' then 'INFO' else 'PASS', $Detail = if not $diagFleetProfile? then 'N/A (no profile yet)' else if $diagFleetLimitBuckets != '' then ('Limiting bucket(s): ' + $diagFleetLimitBuckets) else 'No (another fleet member has stricter cargotarget or smaller hold)']

do_if.value: not ($tempSellStation? and @$tempSellStation.exists) and $wareEntry.$SellStationBase? and @$wareEntry.$SellStationBase.exists and @$wareEntry.$SellStationBase.buildstorage and @$wareEntry.$SellStationBase.buildstorage.exists

not ($tempSellStation? and @$tempSellStation.exists) and $tempBsCand? and @$tempBsCand.exists and $tempBsCand.base? and @$tempBsCand.base.exists and @$tempBsCand.base.idcode == $wareEntry.$DeliveryStationId

set_value.name: $cacheEntryTs
set_value.exact: if $wareEntry.$CachedAt? then @$wareEntry.$CachedAt else (if $wareEntry.$Timestamp? then @$wareEntry.$Timestamp else null)

do_if.value: $cvReason == '' and ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and $diagMk4DedicatedServe and not $diagMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode and $diagMk4HomeAnchor? and not $wareEntry.$IsSellOnly?

$cvReason == '' and ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and not $wareEntry.$IsSellOnly? and $tempSellStationOk and (not $tempSellStation.isclass.buildstorage or $ignoreBuildStorage)
$cvReason == '' and $diagCacheMinROI gt 0 and $wareEntry.$BuyPrice? and $wareEntry.$BuyPrice gt 0 and $wareEntry.$UnitProfit?
$cvReason == '' and $diagCacheDropoff gt 0 and not $wareEntry.$IsSellOnly? and $wareEntry.$UnitProfit? and $wareEntry.$UnitProfit gt 0 and $wareEntry.$BuyOffer? and $wareEntry.$SellOffer?
not $cvSkipSupplierBand and $ignorePlayerPricing and $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' and $wareEntry.$BuyOffer? and @$wareEntry.$BuyOffer.exists and @$wareEntry.$BuyOffer.owner.isplayerowned

($tempBuyStationOk and @$tempBuyStation.isclass.ship and (@$tempBuyStation.type == shiptype.carrier or @$tempBuyStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)) or ($tempSellStationOk and @$tempSellStation.isclass.ship and (@$tempSellStation.type == shiptype.carrier or @$tempSellStation.type == shiptype.resupplier))
$cvReason == '' and not $wareEntry.$IsSellOnly? and $wareEntry.$BuyOffer? and @$wareEntry.$BuyOffer.exists and $wareEntry.$SellOffer? and @$wareEntry.$SellOffer.exists

append_to_list.name: $cvReasonHist
append_to_list.exact: table[$Reason = $cvReason, $Count = 1]

set_value.name: $cvAmtShow
set_value.exact: if $tempPreSellAmt? and $tempPreSellAmt gt 0 then $tempPreSellAmt else (if $wareEntry.$Amount? then $wareEntry.$Amount else 0)

append_to_list.name: $cvDataRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = ('#' + $wi + ' ' + $cvWareLabel), $Status = $cvStatus, $Detail = $cvRoute, $Col4 = $cvAmtVolCol, $Col5 = $cvScoreCol, $Col6 = $cvReasonCol]

do_if.value: not ($entrySellStationObj? and @$entrySellStationObj.exists) and $entry.$SellStationBase? and @$entry.$SellStationBase.exists and @$entry.$SellStationBase.buildstorage and @$entry.$SellStationBase.buildstorage.exists

not ($entrySellStationObj? and @$entrySellStationObj.exists) and $entryBsCand? and @$entryBsCand.exists and $entryBsCand.base? and @$entryBsCand.base.exists and @$entryBsCand.base.idcode == $entry.$DeliveryStationId
not $entryCargoOk or not $entrySellStationOk or (not $entry.$IsSellOnly? and not $entryBuyStationOk) or $shipFailed == 'YES'

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '#' + $ci, $Status = $entryRowStatus, $Detail = $detailStr]

append_to_list.name: $sec7v.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Summary', $Status = if $cvPassCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $cvPassCount + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' PASS (mirrors lib.gt.cache.search per-ship gates)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7v.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Fail Histogram', $Status = if $cvPassCount lt $cacheEntryCount then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = $cvFailHistDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec7v.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Row Cap', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Showing first ' + $cvMaxRows + ' of ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries (cache sorted by score desc)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7v.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Per-Entry Validation ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Status | Ware | Route | Amount/Vol | Score | Reason']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Unique Wares In Cache', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $uniqueWares.keys.count + ' wares']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4-2 Cache Bucket Mix', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $diagCacheBucketDetail + ' (delivery class x supplier source; legacy entries infer source from BuyStation)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo-Compatible Entries', $Status = if $cargoCompatCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $cacheEntryCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO'), $Detail = '' + $cargoCompatCount + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' (cargo.max or $CargoWareTransport)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo-Incompatible Entries', $Status = if $cargoIncompatCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $cargoIncompatCount + ' entries for other hold types']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Missing Sell Station (stale cache)', $Status = if $cacheRejectNoSellStation gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $cacheRejectNoSellStation + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries have no resolvable $SellStation / $SellOffer.buyer (lib.gt.cache.search skips these)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Missing Buy Station (stale cache)', $Status = if $cacheRejectNoBuyStation gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $cacheRejectNoBuyStation + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries have no resolvable $BuyStation / $BuyOffer.seller']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cache Runtime Readable', $Status = if $cacheRuntimeReadableCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $cacheEntryCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO'), $Detail = '' + $cacheRuntimeReadableCount + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' pass full lib.gt.cache.search gate walk for this ship (see Cache Validation tab for per-entry reasons; TTL=' + (($diagCacheTTL / 1s)i) + 's)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Rejected: Zero Offer Amount', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $cacheRejectOfferAmount + ' entries failed per-ship offeramount/demand fallback (saturation or stale offers)']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Rejected: Trade Rules', $Status = 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $cacheRejectTradeRules + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries blocked by player-station trade rules (Ignore Trade Rules is off). NPC×NPC pairs are not checked.']

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Expired Entries (>600s)', $Status = if $expiredCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $expiredCount + ' / ' + [20, $cacheEntryCount].min]

append_to_list.name: $sec7.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'This Ship In FailedShips', $Status = if $failedShipCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $failedShipCount + ' entries have this ship in FailedShips']

set_value.name: $sec8.$Name
set_value.exact: if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'Search Summary (Buyer Side)' else 'Search Summary'

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Search Pipeline', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'MK1 export buyer scan (order slider ' + $mk1DiagPriceOffset + '/200, buy min ' + ($mk1DiagPriceNorm * 100) + '%, norm ' + $mk1DiagPriceNorm + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Search Pipeline', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $pipelineState + ' (Sell max: ' + ($activeSellPriceMax * 100) + '%, Buy min: ' + ($activeBuyPriceMin * 100) + '%)']

set_value.name: $diagOfferScanModeDetail
set_value.exact: 'tradepartner + per-ship offeramount (mirrors lib.gt.live.search.xml; pair gates mirror trade_found validation)'

set_value.name: $diagOfferScanModeDetail
set_value.exact: 'BS buyer-targeted + player buy-offer supplemental (mirrors lib.gt.live.search MK4 completion pass; post-filter buyer=buildstorage + coverage)'

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Offer Scan Mode', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $diagOfferScanModeDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sectors In Range', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors (distance=' + $diagSearchDistance + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Miner Offer Ware Scope', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

do_if.value: not $diagOfferStation? or not $diagOfferStation.exists or not $diagOfferStation.isplayerowned or $diagOfferIsPrimary

append_to_list.name: $diagMinerPolicyRejectedSamples
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $diagRejectWareText, $Status = $diagRejectSampleStatus, $Detail = $diagRejectStationText, $Col6 = $diagOfferRejectReason]

append_to_list.name: $sectorBreakdown
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $searchSec.knownname, $Status = $sectorOfferStatus, $Detail = $secMinerDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sectorBreakdown
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $searchSec.knownname, $Status = $sectorOfferStatus, $Detail = '' + $secSellCount, $Col4 = '' + $secBuyCount, $Col5 = '' + ($secSellCount + $secBuyCount), $Col6 = '']

do_if.value: not $m1rOffer? or not $m1rOffer.exists or not $m1rOffer.ware? or $m1rOffer.ware != $m1ew
not $m1bOffer? or not $m1bOffer.exists or not $m1bOffer.ware? or $m1bOffer.ware != $m1ew

append_to_list.name: $sectorBreakdown
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $m1SearchSec.knownname, $Status = if $m1SecPassCount gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $m1SecPassCount + ' / ' + $m1SecRawCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $m1SecRawCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' (policy / raw)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Buyer Offers In Range (raw)', $Status = $diagMinerRawStatus, $Detail = '' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' (engine + minable + cargo-fit; what the miner AI sees)']

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicyStatus
set_value.exact: if $allBuyOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL')

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicyDetail
set_value.exact: '' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' of ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' pass primary/overflow policy'

set_value.name: $diagMinerPolicyDetail
set_value.exact: $diagMinerPolicyDetail + ' - buyers exist but your config rejects them all'

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Stations Buying Your Ore (policy-passing)', $Status = $diagMinerPolicyStatus, $Detail = $diagMinerPolicyDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Policy Rejection Breakdown', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerPolicyBreakdown]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Home Station Sell Offers', $Status = if $allSellOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $allSellOffers.count + ' export offer' + (if $allSellOffers.count == 1 then '' else 's') + ' (after export gate: ' + (if $mk1DiagEffectiveWares? then $mk1DiagEffectiveWares.count else 0) + ' wares)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Buyer Offers In Range (raw)', $Status = $mk1DiagRawStatus, $Detail = '' + $mk1DiagRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $mk1DiagRawBuyOfferCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' (tradepartner + ware + space; what exists in range)']

set_value.name: $mk1DiagEngineStatus
set_value.exact: if $mk1DiagEngineBuyOfferCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $mk1DiagRawBuyOfferCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL')

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Buyer Offers (engine match)', $Status = $mk1DiagEngineStatus, $Detail = '' + $mk1DiagEngineBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer' + (if $mk1DiagEngineBuyOfferCount == 1 then '' else 's') + ' (match_buyer + relativeprice min ' + $mk1DiagPriceNorm + ', amount min 1)']

set_value.name: $mk1DiagPolicyStatus
set_value.exact: if $allBuyOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $mk1DiagRawBuyOfferCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL')

set_value.name: $mk1DiagPolicyDetail
set_value.exact: '' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' NPC buyer offer' + (if $allBuyOffers.count == 1 then '' else 's') + ' pass runtime export policy (npc_only + per-ship offeramount ge 1)'

set_value.name: $mk1DiagPolicyDetail
set_value.exact: $mk1DiagPolicyDetail + ' - buyers visible in raw scan but runtime pre-filters reject them all'

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Buyer Offers In Range (NPC policy)', $Status = $mk1DiagPolicyStatus, $Detail = $mk1DiagPolicyDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK1 Policy Rejection Breakdown', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $mk1DiagPolicyBreakdown]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Player Buyers Excluded (MK1 npc_only)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $mk1DiagPlayerBuyersExcluded + ' player buy offer' + (if $mk1DiagPlayerBuyersExcluded == 1 then '' else 's') + ' found but MK1 export only sells to NPC stations']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Sell Offers', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $allSellOffers.count]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Buy Offers', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $allBuyOffers.count]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP: Player Suppliers Added', $Status = if $diagIppPlayerSuppliersAdded gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $diagIppPlayerSuppliersAdded + ' player sell offer' + (if $diagIppPlayerSuppliersAdded == 1 then '' else 's') + ' admitted past relativeprice cap']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP: Player Buyers Excluded', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $diagIppPlayerBuyersRejected + ' player buy offer' + (if $diagIppPlayerBuyersRejected == 1 then '' else 's') + ' filtered (sell only to NPCs)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Per Sector ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

set_value.name: $sellLabelSec
set_value.exact: if $sellLabelBase? and $sellLabelBase.sector? then @$sellLabelBase.sector else (if $sellStation.sector? then @$sellStation.sector else null)

set_value.name: $sellStationLabel
set_value.exact: @$sellStation.knownname + ' @ ' + (if $sellLabelBase? and $sellLabelBase.knownname? then @$sellLabelBase.knownname else 'base') + ' (' + (if $sellLabelSec? and $sellLabelSec.knownname? then @$sellLabelSec.knownname else 'unknown sector') + ')'

append_to_list.name: $diagRuntimePassPairs
append_to_list.exact: table[$Score = $pairScore, $SellOffer = $sellOffer, $BuyOffer = $buyOffer, $Ware = $m1Ware, $Desc = $drPassDesc]

append_to_list.name: $pairDetails
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $m1Ware.name, $Status = $pairVerdict, $Detail = $pdRoute, $Col4 = $pdProfitStr, $Col5 = $pdScoreStr, $Col6 = $pairReason, $SortKey = $pairScore]

do_if.value: not $diagPairWareAllowed and ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and $priorityWares.count gt 0

set_value.name: $sellLabelSec
set_value.exact: if $sellLabelBase? and $sellLabelBase.sector? then @$sellLabelBase.sector else (if $sellStation.sector? then @$sellStation.sector else null)

set_value.name: $sellStationLabel
set_value.exact: @$sellStation.knownname + ' @ ' + (if $sellLabelBase? and $sellLabelBase.knownname? then @$sellLabelBase.knownname else 'base') + ' (' + (if $sellLabelSec? and $sellLabelSec.knownname? then @$sellLabelSec.knownname else 'unknown sector') + ')'

set_value.name: $pairReason
set_value.exact: 'mk4_trade_rules: customer ' + (if $sellStation? and $sellStation.exists then $sellStation.knownname else 'customer') + ' disallows source ' + (if $buyStation? and $buyStation.exists then $buyStation.knownname else 'source')

set_value.name: $pairReason
set_value.exact: 'mk4_trade_rules: source ' + (if $buyStation? and $buyStation.exists then $buyStation.knownname else 'source') + ' disallows delivery to ' + (if $sellStation? and $sellStation.exists then $sellStation.knownname else 'customer')

set_value.name: $diagBsoDist
set_value.exact: if $diagMk4HomeSector? and $diagMk4HomeSector.exists and $sellStation? and $sellStation.sector? then $diagMk4HomeSector.gatedistance.{$sellStation.sector} else -1

do_if.value: $pairVerdict == 'PASS' and ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and $diagMk4DedicatedServe and not $diagMk4BuildStorageOnlyMode and $diagMk4HomeAnchor?

set_value.name: $pairReason
set_value.exact: 'mk4_servehome_station_mismatch (delivery must be home station or its build storage)'

do_if.value: $pairVerdict == 'PASS' and ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') and $buyOffer? and $sellStation? and $sellStation.exists and $pairWare?

do_elseif.value: $ignoreCarrierAux and (($buyStation.isclass.ship and ($buyStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $buyStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)) or ($sellStation.isclass.ship and ($sellStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $sellStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)))
not $sellOffer.offeramount.{$ship}? or $sellOffer.offeramount.{$ship} le 0 or not $buyOffer.offeramount.{$ship}? or $buyOffer.offeramount.{$ship} le 0

do_if.value: $pairVerdict == 'PASS' and $mk3BlacklistApplies and $mk3BlacklistOwner? and global.$GT_MK3FactionBlacklist? and global.$GT_MK3FactionBlacklist.$ShipSelections? and global.$GT_MK3FactionBlacklist.$ShipSelections.{$mk3BlacklistOwner}?

append_to_list.name: $diagRuntimePassPairs
append_to_list.exact: table[$Score = $pairScore, $SelectionScore = $pairSelectionScore, $SortKey = $pdSortKey, $SellOffer = $sellOffer, $BuyOffer = $buyOffer, $Ware = $pairWare, $Desc = $drPassDesc]

set_value.name: $bestDiagPairDesc
set_value.exact: $pairWare.name + ': ' + $buyStation.knownname + ' -> ' + $sellStationLabel + ' (' + ($totalProfit / 100) + ' Cr, ROI ' + (if $diagPairPlayerFreeSupplier then 'n/a (free)' else ('' + $roi + '%')) + (if $diagPairPlayerFreeSupplier then ' [IPP gross]' else '') + ', Score ' + ($pairScore)i + (if $pairShowSel then (' · sel ' + ($pairSelectionScore)i) else '') + ')'

set_value.name: $pdScoreStr
set_value.exact: if not $pairHasDistances then '-' else ('' + ($pairScore)i + (if $pairShowSel then (' · sel ' + ($pairSelectionScore)i) else ''))

set_value.name: $pdReason
set_value.exact: 'IPP: gross sell income; profit/ROI/money gates bypassed'

append_to_list.name: $pairDetails
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $pairWare.name, $Status = $pdStatus, $Detail = $pdRoute, $Col4 = $pdProfitStr, $Col5 = $pdScoreStr, $Col6 = $pdReason, $SortKey = $pdSortKey]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Scoring Model', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Score distance = home→buy + buy→sell (route-aware)' + (if $diagUseSelectionSort then ('; validation sort = score / (1 + ship→buy × ' + $diagShipProxWeight + ') after priority boost') else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Pairs Evaluated', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $pairCount + (if $diagHitEvalCap then (' (cap ' + $diagPairEvalCap + ' reached — counts may be truncated)') else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Pairs Passing All Checks', $Status = if $passCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $passCount + ' / ' + $pairCount + ' (executable parity — mirrors trade_found validation)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Runtime Dispatch (fresh-offer filter)', $Status = if $diagRuntimeDispatchCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $passCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL'), $Detail = '' + $diagRuntimeDispatchCount + ' / ' + $passCount + ' passing pairs would reach validation (mirrors live pipeline)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Runtime Dispatch Preview', $Status = if $diagRuntimeDispatchCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = if $diagRuntimeDispatchCount gt 0 then ('Best: ' + $diagRuntimeBestDispatch + ' | Top: ' + $diagRuntimeBatchPreview) else $diagRuntimeBatchPreview]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Best Passing Pair', $Status = if $passCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = $bestDiagPairDesc]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Best IPP Pair (player supplier)', $Status = if $bestIppPairScore gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = $bestIppPairDesc]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Best NPC Supplier Pair', $Status = if $bestNpcSupplierPairScore gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'INFO', $Detail = $bestNpcSupplierPairDesc]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP vs NPC Score', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Runtime picks highest score: NPC supplier (' + ($bestNpcSupplierPairScore)i + ') beats player supplier (' + ($bestIppPairScore)i + '). IPP does not disable NPC suppliers.']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP vs NPC Score', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Only player-supplier routes pass filters; no competing NPC-supplier pair in the passing set.']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP vs NPC Score', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No passing player-supplier pair. Runtime will use NPC supplier routes only despite IPP being enabled.']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- Rejection Breakdown ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = if ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') then 'MK4 Price Cap Exceeded (source gt customer buy)' else 'No Profit (sell le buy)', $Status = if $rejectNoProfit gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectNoProfit]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Below Profit Threshold', $Status = if $rejectBelowThreshold gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBelowThreshold]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Below ROI Threshold', $Status = if $rejectBelowROI gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBelowROI]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Not Operational', $Status = if $rejectNotOperational gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectNotOperational]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Offer Invalid (unavailable/zero per-ship amount)', $Status = if $rejectOfferInvalid gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectOfferInvalid]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Supplier Clamp Zero (seller_cargo / destination)', $Status = if $rejectSupplierClamp gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectSupplierClamp + ' (clamp_trade_amount preview — mirrors lib.gt.tradematch + trade_found)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Profit Recalc Non-Positive', $Status = if $rejectProfitRecalc gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectProfitRecalc]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK3 Faction Blacklist', $Status = if $rejectMK3Faction gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK3Faction]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Docking Denied', $Status = if $rejectDocking gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectDocking]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Dock Size Incompatible', $Status = if $rejectDockSize gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectDockSize]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Zero Amount', $Status = if $rejectZeroAmount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectZeroAmount]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cant Afford', $Status = if $rejectCantAfford gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCantAfford + (if $ignorePlayerPricing and $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3' then ' (IPP player-supplier pairs exempt)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Path Blocked', $Status = if $rejectPathBlocked gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectPathBlocked]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Blacklisted (station/sector)', $Status = if $rejectBlacklist gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBlacklist]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK1 Supply Excluded', $Status = if $rejectMK1Supply gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK1Supply + (if $ignoreMK1Supply then ' (supplier or customer leg in global.$GT_MK1SuppliedStations)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ware Basket Excluded', $Status = if $rejectWareBasket gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectWareBasket + (if $diagPairWareFilterActive then ' (manual basket active)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Build Storage Excluded', $Status = if $rejectBuildStorage gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectBuildStorage]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Carrier/Aux Excluded', $Status = if $rejectCarrierAux gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCarrierAux]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Foreign Customer Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4ForeignCustomer gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4ForeignCustomer]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Supplier Policy Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4SupplierPolicy gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4SupplierPolicy]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Trade Rules Blocked (customer/source faction)', $Status = if $rejectMK4TradeRules gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4TradeRules + ' (build storage trade rule disallows the source faction; enforced when Ignore Trade Rules is off)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Serve-Home Scope Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4ServeHomeScope gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4ServeHomeScope]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Build Storage Only Blocked', $Status = if $rejectMK4BuildStorageOnly gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4BuildStorageOnly]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Demand Reserved Exhausted', $Status = if $rejectMK4DemandReservedExhausted gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectMK4DemandReservedExhausted]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Illegal Ware', $Status = if $rejectIllegal gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectIllegal + ' (Allow Illegal off — blocks all illegal wares)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Illegal Route (jump path)', $Status = if $rejectRouteIllegal gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectRouteIllegal + ' (Illegal Route Filter on — illegal wares must stay legal on full path)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo Incompatible', $Status = if $rejectCargoType gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCargoType]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Cargo Utilization Below Min', $Status = if $rejectCargoUtil gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectCargoUtil + (if not $useMinCargoThreshold then ' (filter disabled on order)' else if $diagIsolatedForCargoFilter then ' (ignored in isolated mode)' else '')]

append_to_list.name: $sec8.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Same Station (skipped)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $rejectSameStation]

set_value.name: $sec8b.$Name
set_value.exact: if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'Miner Sell Offer Details' else 'Pair Details'

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Illegal Route Filter', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'active — sell offers checked against jump path (ship sector -> buyer sector) for illegal wares']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Sell Offers Passing Policy', $Status = if $allBuyOffers.count gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' offers']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Search Sectors', $Status = if $searchSectors.count gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'FAIL', $Detail = '' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Diagnose Wares', $Status = if $diagMinerOfferWares.count gt 0 then 'INFO' else 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerOfferWaresDetail]

set_value.name: $mAmount
set_value.exact: if $mOffer? and $mOffer.offeramount? and $mOffer.offeramount.{$ship}? then $mOffer.offeramount.{$ship} else (if $mOffer? and $mOffer.amount? then $mOffer.amount else 0)

do_if.value: $diagRouteFilterActive and $mOffer? and $mOffer.ware? and @$mOffer.ware.illegal gt 0 and $mStation? and $mStation.exists and $mStation.sector?

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = if $mOffer? and $mOffer.ware? then $mOffer.ware.name else 'UNKNOWN', $Status = $mStatus, $Detail = $mStationText, $Col4 = '' + (if $mOffer? and $mOffer.unitprice? then ($mOffer.unitprice / 100) else 0) + 'Cr', $Col5 = '' + $mAmount + ' units', $Col6 = $mReason]

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No sell opportunities found with current miner policy.'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No search sectors resolved (home sector/anchor unavailable for diagnose).'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'No diagnose wares available (no mineable cargo and no active miner ware snapshot).'

set_value.name: $mNoOfferReason
set_value.exact: 'All ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' raw buyer offer(s) rejected by miner policy.'

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reason', $Status = 'FAIL', $Detail = $mNoOfferReason]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Policy Rejection Breakdown', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerPolicyBreakdown]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Rejected Offer Samples', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'First ' + $diagMinerPolicyRejectedSamples.count + ' policy-blocked buyer offer(s) — see Primary Station Cargo in section 3 for home-station fill']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Hint', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'See Clearance section for per-station rejection details when the ship is carrying cargo.' ]

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'illegal/cargo: ship cannot carry ' + $pmWare + ' (cargo.max=0 - hold size or container type)'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'illegal/cargo: ' + $pmWare + ' is illegal here and Allow Illegal is OFF'

do_if.value: $mk2OrderIgnoreOffers and $pmSrc.isplayerowned and $pmSrcSdTarget gt 0 and $pmSrcSdCount gt 0 and $pmSrcSdFill ge $mk2StaticStorage

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'noSrcOffer: source has no sell offer for ' + $pmWare + ' (typically: not a sellable ware here, station policy, or relation rules block ' + (if $ship.owner? then @$ship.owner.name else 'this faction') + ')'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'noSrcOffer: source offer present but ' + (if not $pmSrcOfferAvail then 'flagged unavailable' else 'amount=0 (station has no stock to sell right now)')

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'srcNoTarget: source has no allocated cargo target for ' + $pmWare + ' (cargo.target=0 - station manager has not assigned storage)'

set_value.name: $pmReason
set_value.exact: 'srcBelowStatic: source has ' + $pmSrcCount + '/' + $pmSrcTarget + ' = ' + $pmSrcRatio + '% <= ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '% staticStorage reserve (runtime refuses to drain a source below this floor)'

append_to_list.name: $mk2PairRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $pmWare.name, $Status = $pmStatus, $Detail = $pmRoute, $Col4 = '' + (if $pmSrcRatio ge 0 then ('src ' + $pmSrcRatio + '%') else 'src n/a'), $Col5 = '', $Col6 = $pmReason]

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'self: source and destination are the same station'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'distance: no gate path from source to destination (gatedistance=-1, sectors not connected)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'distance: ' + $pmDist + ' gates > ' + $mk2OrderMaxDist + ' maxDistance (raise pilot level or maxDistance)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'noDstOffer: destination does not buy ' + $pmWare + ' (not a resource, not a tradeware, or station/relation policy blocks)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'noDstOffer: dest offer present but ' + (if not $pmDstOfferAvail then 'flagged unavailable' else 'demand=0 (cargo at or above target - no room)')

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'noNeed: dst ' + $pmDstCount + '/' + $pmDstTarget + ' = ' + $pmDstRatio + '% is above ' + $mk2MinStorage + '% minStorage and src ' + $pmSrcRatio + '% does not trigger the rebalance bucket (src must be >' + $mk2MaxStorage + '% maxStorage AND >dst+10)'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'minTrade: computed trade amount is 0 (cargo room ' + $pmShipCargoMax + ', src offer ' + $pmSrcOfferAmount + ', dst demand ' + $pmDstOfferAmount + ')'

set_value.name: $pmReason2
set_value.exact: 'eligible: bucket=' + $pmBucket + ' src=' + $pmSrcRatio + '% dst=' + $pmDstRatio + '% trade=' + $pmTradeAmount + ' units (final amount may be lower after fairness/reservation)'

append_to_list.name: $mk2PairRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $pmWare.name, $Status = $pmStatus2, $Detail = $pmRoute2, $Col4 = 'src ' + $pmSrcRatio + '% / dst ' + $pmDstRatio + '%', $Col5 = (if $pmDist ge 0 then ('' + $pmDist + ' gates') else ''), $Col6 = $pmReason2]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK2 Pairs Evaluated', $Status = if $mk2PairPass gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $mk2PairCount == 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL'), $Detail = '' + $mk2PairCount + ' src*dst*ware combinations checked, ' + $mk2PairPass + ' PASS, ' + ($mk2PairCount - $mk2PairPass) + ' BLOCK (showing first ' + $mk2PairRows.count + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'No Pairs', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No source/destination stations configured (see MK2 Specific section)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Skip Breakdown', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'illegal/cargo=' + $mk2PairSkipIllegal + ', routeIllegal=' + $mk2PairSkipRouteIllegal + ', noSrcOffer=' + $mk2PairSkipNoSrc + ', srcNoTarget=' + $mk2PairSkipSrcNoTarget + ', srcBelowStatic=' + $mk2PairSkipBelowStatic + ', self=' + $mk2PairSkipSelf + ', distance=' + $mk2PairSkipDistance + ', noDstOffer=' + $mk2PairSkipNoDst + ', noNeed=' + $mk2PairSkipNoNeed + ', minTrade=' + $mk2PairSkipMinTrade]

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK1 Export Pairs', $Status = if $passCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else (if $pairCount == 0 then 'WARN' else 'FAIL'), $Detail = '' + $pairCount + ' home-station export × buyer pairs checked, ' + $passCount + ' PASS (showing first ' + $pairDetails.count + ' rows)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'No Home Station', $Status = 'FAIL', $Detail = 'MK1 requires a home station — assign one on the order']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'No Export Wares', $Status = 'FAIL', $Detail = 'No wares pass cargo/illegal filters and export storage gate (Min Product Storage % = ' + $mk1DiagMinSellStorage + ')']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Pairs Evaluated', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $pairCount + ' scanned, ' + $pairDetails.count + ' shown (' + $passCount + ' PASS, ' + ($pairCount - $passCount) + ' FAIL — verdict + reason shown per row)']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Pair Legend', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Every evaluated supply pair is listed with the per-ship verdict + reason. PASS = executable now; FAIL = rejected (e.g. mk4_trade_rules = customer build storage disallows the source faction). [player]/[NPC] = supplier ownership.']

append_to_list.name: $sec8b.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'IPP Pair Legend', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '[IPP] = player-owned supplier; buy cost scored as zero; profit/ROI/money gates bypassed. [NPC] = non-player supplier. Runtime still picks highest score overall.']
