append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Mode', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Ship has cargo (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + ' used). In clearance mode, the ship must sell ALL existing cargo before it can search for new buy trades.']

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '--- ' + $clWare.name + ' ---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Carrying ' + $clWareAmount + ' units (volume: ' + $clWare.volume + '/unit)']

do_if.value: $clVerdict == 'PASS' and $ignoreCarrierAux and $clStation.isclass.ship and ($clStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $clStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)

set_value.name: $clReason
set_value.exact: 'ware is illegal to a faction (AllowIllegal: false)'

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name, $Status = $clVerdict, $Detail = $clStationFull, $Col4 = $clPriceDemand, $Col5 = $clRevenueStr, $Col6 = $clReasonStr]

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Sector: ' + $clSector.knownname, $Col4 = '-', $Col5 = '-', $Col6 = 'No buy offers found in this sector for this ware (after current filters).']

append_to_list.name: $secCL.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = $clWare.name + ' Summary', $Status = $clWareResult, $Detail = '' + $clPassCount + ' viable buyers out of ' + $clBuyerCount + ' total offers found']

set_value.name: $diagMinerSellRunDetail
set_value.exact: 'queued trade: ' + (if $diagTo0? and $diagTo0.ware? and $diagTo0.ware.name? then @$diagTo0.ware.name else '?') + ' x' + (if $diagTo0? and $diagTo0.amount? then $diagTo0.amount else '?') + ' -> ' + (if $diagTo0? and $diagTo0.buyer? and $diagTo0.buyer.exists then @$diagTo0.buyer.knownname else '?')

do_elseif.value: $cargoFree le 0 and ($diagMinerImmOrder == 'MoveToZone' or $diagMinerImmOrder == 'FlyToZone' or $diagMinerImmOrder == 'MoveWait' or $diagMinerImmOrder == 'Jump' or $diagMinerImmOrder == 'UseElevator' or $diagMinerImmOrder == 'MoveToObject')

do_if.value: not $diagMinerOnSellRun and global.$GT_MinerIntents? and global.$GT_MinerIntents.keys.count gt 0
not $diagMinerOnSellRun and global.$GT_MinerDiag? and global.$GT_MinerDiag.{$ship}? and global.$GT_MinerDiag.{$ship}.$IntentPhase?

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Reservation #' + $ri, $Status = if $resShip == $ship then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $resShipName + (if $resShip == $ship then ' (THIS SHIP)' else ''), $Col4 = $resWareName, $Col5 = 'TTL=' + $resTTL + 's', $Col6 = 'Key=' + $resKey ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Reservations', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $totalReservations + ' total, ' + $activeRes + ' active']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reservations', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'No reservation system initialized']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Reservation Stats (Lifetime)', $Status = if ($rsCreated? and $rsCreated gt 0) then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = 'Created: ' + (if $rsCreated? then $rsCreated else 0) + ' | Cleared: ' + (if $rsCleared? then $rsCleared else 0) + ' | Expired: ' + (if $rsExpired? then $rsExpired else 0) + ' | Conflicts: ' + (if $rsConflicts? then $rsConflicts else 0) ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Reservation Stats', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'No stats available (system may not have initialized)']

append_to_list.name: $activeTradingShips
append_to_list.exact: table[$Ship = $atrShip, $Source = $tradeSource, $Ware = $tradeWareName]

set_value.name: $activeTradeSourceInfo
set_value.exact: 'fallback: current trade orders via global.$GT_Ships (' + global.$GT_Ships.keys.count + ' ships)'

do_if.value: $atrShip? and $atrShip.exists and $atrShip.isoperational and $atrShip.order? and (@$atrShip.order.id == 'TradePerform' or @$atrShip.order.id == 'TradeBuy' or @$atrShip.order.id == 'TradeSell')

append_to_list.name: $activeTradingShips
append_to_list.exact: table[$Ship = $atrShip, $Source = 'fallback current order: ' + @$atrShip.order.id, $Ware = 'Unknown (fallback)']

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ships With Active Trades', $Status = if $atrCount gt 0 then 'PASS' else 'WARN', $Detail = '' + $atrCount]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Active Trade Source', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $activeTradeSourceInfo]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Active Trade #' + $ai, $Status = if $atrEntry.$Ship == $ship then 'PASS' else 'INFO', $Detail = $atrDetail, $Col4 = $atrWareName, $Col5 = $atrEntry.$Source, $Col6 = if $atrEntry.$Ship == $ship then 'THIS SHIP' else '' ]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total GT Ships', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $totalGTShips]

append_to_list.name: $sec9.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Ships In Same Home Sector', $Status = if $sameHomeCount gt 5 then 'WARN' else 'INFO', $Detail = '' + $sameHomeCount + ' (excl. this ship)']

append_to_list.name: $sec10.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Failed Pair #' + $failedPairsCount, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $fspDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec10.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Failed Pair #' + $failedPairsCount, $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $fspDetail]

append_to_list.name: $sec10.$Rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Total Failed Sector Pairs', $Status = if $failedPairsCount gt 0 then 'WARN' else 'PASS', $Detail = '' + $failedPairsCount + ' (for current sector)']

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CLEARANCE: Ship is in clearance mode but has no cargo. This should not happen.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'This may be a state inconsistency - try reassigning the GT order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (ILLEGAL CARGO): All ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' potential buyers blocked because ware is illegal to a faction and AllowIllegal is disabled. Ship cannot sell its cargo and is stuck in an infinite retry loop.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable AllowIllegal on this ship/commander to allow selling the cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Or: manually sell the cargo, then reassign the GT order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (NO VIABLE BUYER): ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' potential buyers found but all rejected. Ship cannot sell its cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check the Clearance tab for specific rejection reasons per station.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance or review blacklist settings.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'STUCK (NO BUYERS): No buy offers found for current cargo in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors within range.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance to expand search radius.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check if any stations in range buy these wares.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CLEARANCE OK: ' + $clTotalPass + ' viable buyers found out of ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' total. Ship should be able to sell its cargo.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If the ship is not selling, check scheduler state and queue.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK2 has no source and no destination stations configured - cannot plan trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Reconfigure this MK2 trade order on the ship and assign at least one source station and one destination station via the order params.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK2 has no source stations configured - cannot plan trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Reconfigure this MK2 trade order on the ship and assign at least one source station via the order params.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK2 has no destination stations configured - cannot plan trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Reconfigure this MK2 trade order on the ship and assign at least one destination station via the order params.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: MK1 has no home station configured - cannot export products'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Assign a home station on this MK1 Heron/trader order (the station whose products it should haul).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MK1 IDLE (export gate): no wares above Min Product Storage % (' + $mk1DiagMinSellStorage + ') — station products not ready to export'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Wait for home station storage to fill above the export threshold, or lower Min Product Storage % on the order.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MK2 IDLE (source below static reserve): every sellable ware on the configured ' + (if $mk2OrderBidirectional then 'participating station(s) [bidirectional]' else 'source station(s)') + ' is at or below the static-storage reserve of ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '%. The runtime refuses to drain a source until it climbs ABOVE this threshold. Worst case: ' + $mk2WorstSourceDetail + ' . Highest fill seen: ' + $mk2BestSourceDetail + ' .'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Wait for the source station to produce more stock (the static reserve is intentional - it prevents the trader from emptying a production line below operating margins).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'OR lower the trader Static Storage % in its order params (current ' + $mk2StaticStorage + '%) so it ships earlier - e.g. set it to a value below the highest source fill (' + $mk2BestSourceRatio + '%).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MK2 IDLE (source has no storage allocated): the configured source station(s) have no cargo storage allocated for any of their sellable wares. The runtime cannot read a fill ratio and skips the pair silently.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Wait for the station manager to assign storage to the produced wares, or pick a different source station.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'CRITICAL: No home sector - ship cannot search for trades'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Assign ship to a commander or set a home sector'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'BLOCKED: Money gate - player funds too low (' + ($playerMoney / 100) + ' Cr lt ' + ($moneyGateThreshold / 100) + ' Cr threshold)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase player funds or lower MinPlayerMoney setting'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'TRADES AVAILABLE (MK2): ' + $mk2PairPass + ' of ' + $mk2PairCount + ' configured source/dest/ware combination(s) are eligible' + (if $mk2FirstPassPair != '' then ' (e.g. ' + $mk2FirstPassPair + ')' else '') + '. MK2 trades ONLY its assigned source/destination lists - the sector-wide Search Summary above does not apply to this order.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Eligible pairs exist, so a not-trading ship is limited by a runtime factor this diagnostic does not model: in-flight reservations and fleet fairness (sibling traders may have already claimed the destination intake), search cadence, or the ship currently running another order (e.g. Assist while a fleet subordinate) before it re-enters the MK2 loop. Reservations are intentionally not simulated here (see MK2 pair-eval note).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MK2 NO ELIGIBLE PAIRS: all ' + $mk2PairCount + ' configured source/dest/ware combination(s) are currently blocked - see the MK2 Skip Breakdown and Pair Details for the per-gate reasons (typically noDstOffer / noNeed / noSrcOffer).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Confirm destination stations actually buy the source wares (noDstOffer), that destinations are below minStorage so they still need stock (noNeed), and that sources publish sell offers (noSrcOffer).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'INFO: Fleet money cap flag is set (snapshot ' + (if global.$GT_MoneyCapMoney? then (global.$GT_MoneyCapMoney / 100) else 0) + ' Cr), but player funds (' + ($playerMoney / 100) + ' Cr) are above the gate threshold (' + ($moneyGateThreshold / 100) + ' Cr). MK3/MK4 ships clear this cap on their next search; MK1/MK2 ignore it. This is not blocking this ship.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'No action needed if funds are healthy - the cap self-clears once any solvent MK3/MK4 ship searches. If trades still never start, run diagnose again after a few seconds.'

do_elseif.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' and $allBuyOffers.count == 0 and $selWBest == null and (not $selWStalled? or not $selWStalled)) or ($orderId != 'GalaxyMiner' and ($allSellOffers.count == 0 or $allBuyOffers.count == 0))

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'POLICY BLOCKING (MK1 export): ' + $mk1DiagRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer(s) visible in range across ' + $mk1VerdictSectorCount + ' sectors, but none pass runtime export policy.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' All visible buyers are player-owned; MK1 export only sells to NPC stations (ownerFilter=npc_only).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See MK1 Export Pairs for per-buyer FAIL reasons. engine_match_buyer_or_relativeprice means the station fails match_buyer/relativeprice (not the price slider alone).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'per_ship_offeramount_zero: station has demand but offeramount for this ship is 0 right now (reservations, faction rules, or docking). The ship cannot execute that trade yet.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'MK1 only pairs with NPC buyers. Player station buy orders appear in raw counts but cannot be export targets.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Buyer Price Range slider only affects relativeprice filtering - if engine_match count is 0 at slider 100 (neutral), widening the slider will not help.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'POLICY BLOCKING (sell path): ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer(s) found in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors but none pass per-ware sell policy for the wares in scope.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' At least one ware is at/above the overflow threshold on a primary station — see Primary Station Cargo rows.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' Overflow wares cannot sell elsewhere because Overflow → Sell To Other Stations is disabled.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Primary Station Cargo (section 3) for each primary station ware fill: physical units, target, and % vs overflow threshold ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Miner Sell Offer Details for sample rejected offers with explicit policy reasons.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'For overflow wares (e.g. Ice full at home): enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations or wait for primary demand to drain.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check Demand First is OFF: POLICY BLOCKING here affects selling carried cargo, not permission to mine. See Runtime Demand Stations for the station set the live miner actually uses.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'NO OFFERS: ' + (if $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' then 'No buy offers' else (if $allSellOffers.count == 0 then 'No sell offers' else 'No buy offers')) + ' found in ' + $diagVerdictSectorCount + ' sectors'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max distance to expand search radius'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check if sectors have operational stations'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER STALLED (demand-off full-bay): cargo bay full (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + '). Check Demand First is OFF (stockpile mode) but no primary station is below the ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '% overflow threshold for cargo on board, and Overflow → Sell To Other Stations is disabled. The miner is in full-bay standby until a buyer opens or you intervene.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations so full cargo can sell to non-primary buyers.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Add stations to Target Stations (stationList) or wait for primary demand to drain below ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Demand-off only bypasses the mining demand gate - it does not remove sell policy. See Runtime Demand Stations vs Configured Target Stations in section 3.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER DELIVERING: cargo on board (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + '). Ship is actively executing a sell leg (' + $diagMinerSellRunDetail + ') — not stuck. Clearance/policy rows in this report are a static re-scan and may show 0 matches even while the runtime sell pipeline already selected a buyer.'

do_elseif.value: $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' and not $diagMinerCheckDemandFirst and $diagMinerFullBayNeedsClearance and $diagMinerCargoHasWillingBuyer and not $diagMinerOnSellRun

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER BLOCKED (demand-off deliver): cargo bay full (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + ') but a primary buyer has capacity below the overflow threshold. The miner should run a delivery slice before mining more. If it is still standing by, reload the order or check for a stuck immediate order.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Cargo-first Willing Buyer in section 3 - if PASS, the runtime should deliver on the next mining slice.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Compare Live Stall Reason (snapshot) in section 3 - demand_off_full_bay here means the previous cycle blocked delivery (fixed in current build).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER STALLED (overflow wait): ' + $selWStallCandidate + ' is the highest-urgency reachable ware (urgency ' + $selWStallUrgency + '), but every primary station is at or above the overflow threshold for it (worst fill ' + $selWStallStorageMax + '% ge ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%) and Overflow → Sell To Other Stations is DISABLED. The miner is looping in the demand-recheck wait at order.trade.galaxyminer.xml:1309 and will not deliver until something below changes.'

set_value.name: $selWVerdictAltText
set_value.exact: $selWVerdictAltText + $selWVerdictAlt.$Name + ' in ' + $selWVerdictAltSector + (if $selWVerdictAlt.$ProbeInSector? and $selWVerdictAlt.$ProbeInSector then ' (probe already deployed - asteroid still needs visual/satellite scout)' else '')

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Scout these higher-priority alternatives (asteroids exist but are undiscovered, so vanilla mining refuses to route player ships there): ' + $selWVerdictAltText + (if $selWUndiscoveredAlts.count gt $selWVerdictAltCap then ' (+' + ($selWUndiscoveredAlts.count - $selWVerdictAltCap) + ' more)' else '') + '. ' + (if $selWAnyProbed then 'For sectors marked (probe already deployed) the resource probe reveals yield only - the engine still needs asteroid-level discovery for player-ship routing; fly a ship close to an asteroid OR drop a satellite within line-of-sight. For the others: deploy a resource probe in the sector, scout with a satellite, or fly close enough to spot the asteroid visually.' else 'Deploy a resource probe in each sector, fly close enough to spot the asteroid visually, or have a satellite see it.')

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations on this miner so it can deliver ' + $selWStallCandidate + ' to a non-primary buyer instead of waiting.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower the Overflow Threshold below ' + $selWStallStorageMax + '% (current threshold: ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%) so the primary stations stop counting as full.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Add another primary station that buys ' + $selWStallCandidate + ' so this miner has a sink with real capacity.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER STUCK (full bay): cargo bay full (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + '). Carrying ' + $diagMinerCargoBlockDetail + ' but 0 policy-passing buyers in sell range — cannot mine until cargo is cleared. See Clearance for per-station rejection reasons.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' Would otherwise mine ' + $selWBest + ' (urgency ' + $selWBestUrgency + ') if the bay had free space.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Clearance tab: fix overflow policy (enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations, add primary capacity, or lower overflow threshold) so the carried ware can be sold.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max sell distance or review blacklist if buyers exist but fail distance/path checks.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Overflow → Sell To Other Stations is DISABLED — overflow wares like Ice at 94% primary fill cannot sell to non-primary buyers.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER BLOCKED (full bay): cargo bay full (' + $cargoUsed + '/' + $cargoCap + '). Must sell sellable cargo before mining. Clearance: ' + $clTotalPass + ' viable buyer(s) out of ' + $clTotalBuyers + ' for carried minable wares.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' Unsellable dead cargo will remain after sellable wares are cleared: ' + $diagMinerUnsellableCargoDetail + '.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' Would mine ' + $selWBest + ' once sellable cargo is cleared and bay has space.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If the ship is not selling, check runtime sellwares / physical-storage gate and scheduler state.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Clearance tab for which stations would accept each carried ware.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Unsellable cargo wastes bay capacity — fix overflow policy for those wares (see Clearance rejection reasons) or wait for primary demand to drain.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER OPERATIONAL' + (if $diagMinerHasUnsellableCargo then ' (suboptimal)' else '') + ': would mine ' + $selWBest + ' (urgency ' + $selWBestUrgency + ', primary fill ' + $selWBestStorageMax + '% lt ' + $diagMinerOverflowThreshold + '%).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: $verdict + ' Carrying unsellable dead cargo: ' + $diagMinerUnsellableCargoDetail + ' — reduces effective bay capacity; see Clearance for why those wares have no policy-passing buyers.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Primary Station Cargo (section 3) shows which wares are at/above the overflow threshold on your home station.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'For unsellable overflow wares: enable Overflow → Sell To Other Stations, lower overflow threshold, or add primary capacity so dead cargo can eventually be sold.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Sell-offer policy scan rejected ' + ($diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount - $allBuyOffers.count) + ' distant buyer offer(s) by design (non-primary stations are ignored for wares that still have primary capacity).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'MINER BUYERS AVAILABLE: ' + $allBuyOffers.count + ' of ' + $diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount + ' buyer offer(s) pass policy in ' + $searchSectors.count + ' sectors' + (if $diagMinerAnyBuyerMode then ' (auto-scope: all minable wares)' else ' (policy-scoped)')

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'See Miner Sell Offer Details for station/ware list and demand amounts.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'NOTE: ' + ($diagMinerRawBuyOfferCount - $allBuyOffers.count) + ' additional buyer offer(s) were rejected by your primary/overflow/playerStationsOnly policy - review the Clearance section if your miner is selling to stations not listed here.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'If execution still stalls, compare against live order state (collecting/transfer/sell) and scheduler queue.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'NO MATCHING PAIRS: Offers exist on both sides, but no tradable sell-buy pairs could be formed'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Most matches were same-station loops (' + $rejectSameStation + ' skipped) - this is intentionally ignored.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check ware overlap between sell and buy offers in Pair Details.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Increase max distance or review blacklist constraints to expose more counterpart stations.'

set_value.name: $maxRejectName
set_value.exact: if ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2') then 'mk4_price_cap_exceeded (source price gt customer buy price)' else 'no_profit (sell price le buy price)'

set_value.name: $maxRejectName
set_value.exact: 'route_illegal (Illegal Route Filter — contraband illegal on jump path)'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'ALL REJECTED: 0/' + $pairCount + ' pairs passed. Dominant reason: ' + $maxRejectName + ' (' + $maxReject + ' pairs)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower profit threshold base (current effective: ' + ($finalProfitThreshold / 100) + ' Cr)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower minimum ROI setting (current effective: ' + $effectiveROI + '%)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Check dock size compatibility - ship is ' + $dockSize + '-class'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Some stations are not operational. Wait for production/storage recovery or pick other sectors.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Enable AllowIllegal if you want to include illegal wares.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Illegal Route Filter blocked pairs where contraband would be illegal on the jump path. See Pair Details route_illegal rows for sector/police, or disable the filter / choose different routes.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship cargo hold cannot carry ' + $rejectCargoType + ' pair(s) (solid/liquid vs container). Other fleet members may still cache those wares — see Cache State cargo-compatible count.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Lower minimum cargo utilization target (current: ' + $effectiveCargoTarget + '%) or increase trade volume options (distance/wares).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Offer amount/cargo free/money limits reduce tradable amount to zero for many pairs.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Trading-station broker offers show amount but have no exportable stock (seller_cargo clamp). These are rejected at match time — factory/refinery routes should rank instead.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Review blacklist settings - some routes may be blocked'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'MK4 delivers only to player-owned customers. Foreign-customer pairs are listed as FAIL (mk4_customer_not_player_owned) in Pair Details.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Trade rules block ' + $rejectMK4TradeRules + ' pair(s): the customer build storage only accepts its own faction, so foreign sources cannot supply it (mk4_trade_rules rows). Enable Ignore Trade Rules on the order, or widen the build storage trade rules, to allow foreign suppliers.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Review MK4 supplier policy (buyFromPlayer / buyFromFaction). Current policy excludes many suppliers.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'serveHomeOnly is active: delivery must match home anchor (home station, its build storage, or home sector).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Build storage only mode is active (Include Build Storage on, all ware categories off): only in-scope build storage buyers; no BS supplier legs or normal-station deliveries.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Demand is already covered by incoming reservations (vanilla + GT in-flight). Wait for execution/expiry or target different wares/stations.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ignore MK1-Supplied Stations is blocking routes touching MK1-fed stations (supplier or customer leg). Disable it or remove the player station from global.$GT_MK1SuppliedStations if you want IPP trades through it.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'IPP is on but no player sell offers passed the supplier scan. Check home sector range, ware basket, station operational state, and blacklist.'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'PAIRS PASS GATES BUT RUNTIME BATCH EMPTY: ' + $passCount + ' pairs passed validation parity, but 0 survive fresh-offer filter (mirrors live pipeline before trade_found)'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Offers may have been reserved or exhausted between scan and dispatch. Retry diagnose or wait for offer refresh.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Many pairs failed supplier_clamp_zero — trading-station brokers without exportable stock. Runtime now rejects these at match time (lib.gt.tradematch v6+).'

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'TRADES AVAILABLE: ' + $diagRuntimeDispatchCount + ' pairs would reach validation. Best: ' + $diagRuntimeBestDispatch

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3') and $cacheExists and $cacheEntryCount gt 0 and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount == 0

set_value.name: $verdict
set_value.exact: 'LIVE ONLY (cache not runtime-ready): ' + $diagRuntimeDispatchCount + ' pairs via live search; 0 / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' cache rows readable for this ship. Best: ' + $diagRuntimeBestDispatch

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship should be able to find trades. If it is not trading, check scheduler state and queue.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Note: ' + ($passCount - $diagRuntimeDispatchCount) + ' passing pair(s) dropped by fresh-offer filter since scan (offeramount/amount stale).'

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3') and $cacheExists and $cacheEntryCount gt 0 and $cargoIncompatCount gt 0 and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount == 0 and $cacheRejectNoSellStation == 0 and $diagRuntimeDispatchCount gt 0

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Cache pool has ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries but 0 are runtime-readable for this ship (' + $cargoIncompatCount + ' wrong hold type). Live search finds trades; cache read skips them.'

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3') and $cacheExists and $cacheEntryCount gt 0 and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount == 0 and $diagRuntimeDispatchCount gt 0 and $cacheRejectNoSellStation gt 0

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'CACHE POISONED: ' + $cacheRejectNoSellStation + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' entries lack a resolvable delivery station ($SellStation / $SellOffer.buyer dead). Runtime logs Cache MISS (pool=' + $cacheEntryCount + ', trades=0) while live finds ' + $diagRuntimeDispatchCount + ' pairs. Stale entries inflate pool size without helping this ship.'

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3') and $cacheExists and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount gt 0 and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount lt $cacheEntryCount

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Only ' + $cacheRuntimeReadableCount + ' / ' + $cacheEntryCount + ' cache entries are runtime-readable for this ship (see Cache State: Missing Sell/Buy Station, Cache Runtime Readable).'

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3') and $cacheExists and $cacheEntryCount gt 0 and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount == 0 and $diagRuntimeDispatchCount gt 0

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Ship will miss cache and queue for mk4live/live search. Check Scheduler State (MK4 live waiters / home refresh lock) if search is slow.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'IPP enabled but an NPC-supplier route scores higher (' + ($bestNpcSupplierPairScore)i + ' vs ' + ($bestIppPairScore)i + '). Runtime will prefer the NPC route unless you block it (blacklist, MK1-supply filter, etc.).'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'No passing player-supplier pair despite IPP. Check MK1-supply exclusion, ware basket, and whether your player station has sell offers in range.'

append_to_list.name: $suggestions
append_to_list.exact: 'Some player routes may be blocked by Ignore MK1-Supplied Stations (checks both supplier and customer legs). See mk1_supply_excluded rows in Pair Details.'

do_if.value: ($orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK4Supply2' or $orderId == 'GalaxyTraderMK3') and $cacheExists and $cacheEntryCount gt 0 and $cacheRuntimeReadableCount == 0

do_elseif.value: not $isClearanceMode and $orderId == 'GalaxyMiner' and not $diagMinerCheckDemandFirst and $diagMinerFullBayNeedsClearance and $diagMinerCargoHasWillingBuyer and not $diagMinerOnSellRun

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'VERDICT', $Status = $verdictStatus, $Detail = $verdict]

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Policy Rejection Breakdown', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = $diagMinerPolicyBreakdown]

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Rejected Offer Samples', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'First ' + [$diagMinerPolicyRejectedSamples.count, 6].min + ' policy-blocked buyer offer(s)']

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'MK4 Policy', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'exec-only pairs, priceCap source<=customer, demandGate vanillaRes+gtInFlight(global), ignoreTradeRules=faction-access-only']

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Suggestion #' + $si, $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = $suggestions.{$si}]

append_to_list.name: $verdictRows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = '---', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = '']

do_if.value: not $ship? or not $ship.exists or not $ship.commander? or not $ship.commander.exists

show_notification.text: '[GT] Promote unavailable: no valid commander found.'

debug_text.text: '[GT Promote] Requested for subordinate ' + $ship.idcode + ' under commander ' + $ship.commander.idcode
